programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: While in a precarious position with a woman, Charlie injures his back and won't let Alan, a chiropractor, help him; after Alan drives Charlie to the doctor's office, Charlie is surprised to learn that his physician died four years ago, and a female, Dr. Michelle Talmadge, has replaced him; Berta teaches Jake a lesson.

programme.sub-title: Hit Me With Your Best Cart
programme.desc: A woman files for $5000 in damages when her neighbor's 15-year-old son takes an unauthorized joyride in a golf cart and slams into her car.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A disabled retiree sues her former friend over $9,000 allegedly given for slot machines to open a game room together; the friend claims they were both scammed.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.sub-title: Did You Watch Porn With Our Daughters and Molest Them?

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: The Best Way to Find Out; Truth: Secrets Revealed After Mom's Death
programme.desc: Crystal learned that her boyfriend, Kelon, cheated during their first year together, and though she took him back, she's now questioning whether that was a mistake; London and Joshua grew up believing they were siblings but have recently discovered that they may not be related at all, and after everything they've been through together, the possibility of not being sister and brother is heartbreaking.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: Half sisters wield a broomstick and a knife in violent disputes against each other; both filed restraining orders and sue for damages.

programme.desc: A Palm Springs cleaning business owner sues her luxury apartment rental client for $3,000, alleging non-payment and termination without cause.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A California couple files a lawsuit against a woman for damages caused by her 14-year-old son, who crashed into their garage door while riding an electric bike.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.sub-title: This Could Destroy Our Life Together

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: DNA: 3 Tests for the Truth; Update: DNA: Multiple Men Could Be the Dad!
programme.desc: Shazique says his ex, Tatiana, told him he was the father of three of her children until she abruptly changed her story, but his girlfriend Tammy says that Tatiana is bitter about his new relationship and is being vindictive; Amari believed that Marty could be the father of her baby, but it turned out that he wasn't, so she returns, saying that another mystery man, Dontavius, could be the father!

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: A man accuses his ex-girlfriend of using his credit card to bail out her new lover and stealing his emotional support cat; a woman sues a designer for emotional distress and the cost of her birthday party because the dress was not delivered in time.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.sub-title: Mother's Day Grief; Personal Trainer in the Hotseat
programme.desc: The Judge rules on two cases in this episode; in the first proceeding, a woman passes away on Mother's Day leaving her grieving son scrambling to pay for funeral expenses; in the second case, a woman sues her trainer for a personal loan.
